lane_2_root_causes_found.root_cause: classify() search fast-path gap in intent_classifier.ts
lane_2_root_causes_found.description: classifyOperation() at line 65 of classify() catches 'search' keyword before suggestSystemType() can return 'search'. R151F fix was placed in suggestSystemType() but was unreachable because the early-return at line 66-75 intercepts first.
lane_2_root_causes_found.fix: Added search-indicator fast-path before classifyOperation() in classify() method

lane_2_root_causes_found.root_cause: require() called inside function body in ESM mode
lane_2_root_causes_found.description: orchestrator.execute() at line 69 used require('./context_envelope'). In Jest --experimental-vm-modules mode, require is undefined at runtime. Throws 'require is not defined', caught by try/catch, returns {success:false}.
lane_2_root_causes_found.fix: Converted to static ESM import at module scope (line 17 of orchestrator.ts)

lane_2_root_causes_found.description: jest.fn() without return value returns undefined. Then ctx.request_id = ... in orchestrator.ts throws TypeError: Cannot set properties of undefined. Caught by try/catch, returns {success:false}.
lane_2_root_causes_found.fix: ensureContextEnvelope mock now returns a proper object: jest.fn((req: any) => ({...req, context_id: 'test-context-id', request_id: req.requestId, session_id: req.sessionId}))

mocks.ensureContextEnvelope: returns {context_id, request_id, session_id} instead of undefined

lane_3_test_doubles_applied.type: MockDeerFlowClient class injected via Orchestrator constructor

lane_6_key_patterns.esm_require_incompatibility: Jest --experimental-vm-modules runs TS as true ESM where require is undefined. jest.mock() hoists but require() inside function bodies executes at runtime. Solution: static ESM import at module scope.
lane_6_key_patterns.search_keyword_conflict: 'search' in WEB_ACTION_KEYWORDS and SEARCH_INDICATORS. classifyOperation() catches first. Fast-path in classify() before classifyOperation() routes correctly.
lane_6_key_patterns.mock_return_value_correctness: jest.fn() without return returns undefined. Code that sets properties on mock result throws TypeError. Mock must return a proper object.
lane_6_key_patterns.constructor_DI_for_mocks: Orchestrator accepts optional dfClient parameter. In test, inject new MockDeerFlowClient() directly — bypasses module system and gives precise control.

lane_7_files_modified.change: Added search-indicator fast-path before classifyOperation() in classify() — completes R151F fix that was in suggestSystemType() but unreachable
Converted require('./context_envelope') at line 69 to static ESM import at module scope
Added context_envelope mock, MockDeerFlowClient class, DI in beforeEach

lane_8_next_phase.reason: All 3 assertion failures resolved. Next: configuration hygiene, security settings, environment isolation before R155 final functional sweep.
